description: A process engineer has updated a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) and needs to submit it for approval and release.

nodes.task_description: Check out the current version of the SOP from the document control system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks out the document, locking it for editing.

nodes.task_description: Upload the new version of the SOP and provide a summary of the changes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uploads the revised file and enters change control notes.

nodes.task_description: Submit the revised document into the approval workflow.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the document, and it is routed to the quality manager for review.
